creator: victor@bouvier-deleau.fr
text:
Created attachment 212917
Patch to update py-borgmatic from 1.3.26_1 to 1.5.1

Patch to update py-borgmatic from 1.3.26_1 to 1.5.1.

I've searched the project repository for new files that would contain references to '/etc/borgmatic' other than the one already present in the 'post-patch' section of the Makefile and didn't find any.

This was tested by creating a borgmatic config from scratch, making a backup to a remote repository and restoring it locally.

Changelog: https://projects.torsion.org/witten/borgmatic/src/tag/1.5.1/NEWS
